data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where the group size changes after booking. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific interactions or outcomes that demonstrate how the system responds to such changes. The linked use case outlines the need for handling group size changes but lacks concrete evidence of this functionality being implemented, leading to a conclusion of a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of system behavior when group size changes after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
